category_sources: Official homepage at https://lczero.org/ says Leela Chess Zero is an open source neural network based chess engine.
source_facts.description says it is an open source neural network based chess engine.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is LeelaChessZero/lc0 and README refers to Lc0 as the UCI-compliant chess engine.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is an official source documentation fallback.
Official homepage provides user-facing project entry points.
Official lczero.org dev wiki imports and organizes GitHub wiki documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/LeelaChessZero/lc0, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage says Lc0 is inspired by AlphaZero and uses a neural network learned through self-play.
